caption: A young child wearing a red and white striped short-sleeved shirt and dark brown pants is seen climbing out of a doorway in a reddish-brown mud building. Behind the child, a bright yellow fabric with white circular patterns hangs as a curtain over the opening. The child is positioned in a crouched posture, using their hands to push off the earthen ledge and their feet to step forward onto the uneven, reddish soil ground. Across the sequence, the child gradually shifts their weight and moves their body forward and slightly downward, transitioning from a deeper crouch to a more balanced position as they emerge from the doorway. The background consists of the textured mud walls of the structure and the dark interior of the room visible behind the curtain.
